word: H8232 - שְׁפַר - shᵉphar - shef-ar' - Be acceptable

sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁפר

Transliteration: shephar

Phonetic: shef-ar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be fair, be seemly, seem good, seem pleasing
    1. (Peal) to seem good, be acceptable

Origin: corresponding to H8231

TWOT entry: 3046

Part(s) of speech: Verb
